code: import axios from"axios";const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:5000/api";const apiClient=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}});export const getRequest=function(url){let config=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return apiClient.get(url,config);};export const postRequest=function(url){let data=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};let config=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:{};return apiClient.post(url,data,config);};export const putRequest=function(url){let data=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};let config=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:{};return apiClient.put(url,data,config);};export const fetchCustomers=()=>getRequest("/customers");export const createCustomer=payload=>postRequest("/customers",payload);export const updateCustomerBalance=(customerId,payload)=>putRequest(`/customers/${customerId}/balance`,payload);export default apiClient;
